modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to find information on current ITS maintenance and outages.

full_description_text:  
- I'm trying to check what ITS maintenance is currently happening.  
- I also want to know if there's any outage going on right now.  
- It would be really helpful to get updates on scheduled maintenance and alerts.
short_description: Unable to find information on current ITS maintenance and outages.
description:
- I'm trying to check what ITS maintenance is currently happening.  
- I also want to know if there's any outage going on right now.  
- It would be really helpful to get updates on scheduled maintenance and alerts.
